description_long: This is a heavily crushed and discarded aluminum beverage can, predominantly red with white branding and text. The can's body is severely deformed, with deep creases and folds, and both the top and bottom ends are visibly compressed. The top features a standard stay-on pull tab, and the bottom displays stamped manufacturing codes. The surface is glossy, with some areas showing scuff marks and minor scratches, but no significant rust or corrosion. A white, curving script logo and other product information are partially visible, along with a vertical barcode on one side. The can's compacted form suggests it has been stepped on or otherwise forcefully compressed, making it a common piece of street litter.
description: A crushed red aluminum beverage can with white branding, visible pull tab, and barcode, showing heavy deformation and minor surface wear.
description_view_0: The bottom of the can is prominent, showing stamped codes and a flattened, wrinkled red body with partial white logo visible.
description_view_1: The side and top of the can are visible, highlighting the stay-on pull tab and a large, sharply creased red surface with white script.
description_view_2: The top of the can with the pull tab is most visible, along with the compacted body and some product information text.
description_view_3: The bottom and side of the can are shown, with the barcode and more of the white logo and text visible on the crumpled red surface.
attribute_brand_logo: Curved white script logo, characteristic of Coca-Cola, on a red background.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the side of the can near the bottom.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Severe crushing and dents throughout the can, minor scratches and scuff marks, no visible rust or corrosion.
